Meet ZZ, Young CEO & Lip Gloss Artist

The amazing story of how an 8-year-old turned her love for shiny things into a real business!

My Story

Hi! I'm ZZ and I'm 8 years old. I started ZZ's Lip Gloss Co. because I LOVE anything that sparkles and shines! One day, I was watching my mom put on lip gloss and I thought "I could make that even more beautiful!"

So I asked my mom and brothers to help me learn how to make lip gloss safely. We found recipes that are perfect for kids to make, and I practiced and practiced until I could make the most amazing lip glosses ever!

Now I have my own business! I love mixing the ingredients, choosing the colors, and especially seeing how happy people get when they try my lip glosses. Every lip gloss is made by me with lots of love and care.

What Makes My Lip Glosses Special?

  • I test every single batch myself (they taste amazing!)
  • I only use ingredients that are safe for kids and grown-ups
  • Each flavor is my own special recipe
  • I package each one with a handwritten thank you note
  • Some of my profits go to help kids of families in need!
👩‍💼

That's me in my "laboratory" (aka kitchen) making lip gloss!

My Business Goals

🎯

Make 1000 customers smile

💰

Save for college

🤝

Help kids in need

🏪

Have my own store someday

What People Say

"My daughter absolutely loves the Cotton Candy Dreams flavor! ZZ is such an inspiring young entrepreneur." - Sarah M.

"The quality is amazing and you can tell it's made with so much love. We're proud to support such a talented young business owner!" - Maria R.

"ZZ's lip glosses are my Corgi's favorite! He says they make his feel like a prince." - Cousin Cowboy

Want to Support My Dream?

Every purchase helps me learn about business, save for my future, and most importantly - makes someone feel beautiful!
